intent: Tighten hill-climb fail-fast contracts, remove legacy fallback behavior, and reduce test brittleness from monkeypatch-heavy seams.
assumptions: The documented active hill-climb edit path should remain contracts/src/Strategy.sol.
Legacy compaction should fail on malformed or underspecified retained artifacts instead of guessing missing state.
validation: uv run ruff check amm_competition/hill_climb/harness.py amm_competition/cli.py tests/test_hill_climb.py
uv run ty check amm_competition/hill_climb/harness.py amm_competition/cli.py tests/test_hill_climb.py
